prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次为约 3339→5540→3883→4851→5195 名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年（2023–2025）累计后移约 1312 名；2025 年基准位次约 5195 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 56 人、2022 年 55 人、2023 年 55 人、2024 年 55 人、2025 年 68 人；2026 年计划 69 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 1.5%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 30 位持续上升至 2026 年第 24 位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；2024 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，投档异常信号为「高关注」，考生反映招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致当年投档线暴跌约 500 名，该负面舆情对 2025–2026 年报考心理可能有滞后影响；但抖音热度排名第 13（高热），食堂等生活条件获大量正面曝光，整体热度仍较高。2025–2026 年声誉文件中未见中国农业大学新增重大负面事件；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 7 个：作物学 A+、兽医学 A+、畜牧学 A+、草学 A+、食品科学与工程 A+、植物保护 A、生物学 A，农林学科实力顶尖，与招生专业（农学、动物医学类、食品科学与工程类等）高度匹配，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，该校计算机类、电子信息类、机械类等招生专业受益于整体工科热度；2026 年内蒙古考生总数约 15.4 万人，较 2025 年（约 11.6 万）大幅增加约 33%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 11.2 万人，较 2025 年增加约 34%，考生规模显著扩大加剧竞争。；中国农业大学位于北京，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划近年持续增加（55→68→69），招生占比有所提升，但考生增幅远超计划增幅。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划仅小幅扩招（+1.5%）、内蒙古考生总数大幅增加（+33%）导致竞争加剧、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力、2024 年负面舆情可能有滞后影响等因素，在 2025 年基准 5195 名基础上预计位次继续后移（更难进）。预测最低位次约 5261 名，区间 4761–5761 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3339→5540→3883→4851→5195, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 1312 places in the last 3 years (2023–2025); the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5195; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 56 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 68 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 69, a slight expansion of about 1.5% compared to 2025, with limited impact on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking rose from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates; the 2024 reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', with an abnormal signal of 'high attention' for admissions, as candidates reported poor communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a drop of about 500 places in the admission line; this negative public opinion may have a lagging effect on 2025–2026 application psychology; however, Douyin popularity ranks 13th (high heat), with many positive exposures of cafeteria and living conditions, maintaining overall high popularity. No new major negative events for China Agricultural University were found in the 2025–2026 reputation documents; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 7 disciplines at A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, with top-tier agricultural and forestry disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors (Agriculture, Veterinary Medicine, Food Science and Engineering, etc.), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended; the university's enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering benefit from overall engineering popularity; in 2026, the total number of candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025 (about 116,000); estimated physics category candidates are about 112,000, an increase of about 34% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolian candidates; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Inner Mongolia has been increasing in recent years (55→68→69), with an increased enrollment share, but the candidate increase far exceeds the plan increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and declining trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1.5%), the significant increase in total Inner Mongolia candidates (+33%) intensifying competition, the continuous rise in school rankings enhancing attractiveness, and the possible lagging effect of the 2024 negative public opinion, the ranking is expected to continue declining (harder to enter) based on the 2025 baseline of 5195. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5261, with a range of 4761–5761.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4761–5761, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a moderate reach and Tier 3 as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<4761), you can focus on Tier 1, including Science Experimental Classes and popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is near the lower limit (>5761), you should prioritize Tier 3 and Yantai Research Institute majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 542 → 696 → 1095 → 947 → 1140, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the last 3 years (2023–2025), the cumulative backward shift was about 45 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1140. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, an increase of about 4.8% compared to 2025, but the expansion rate is far lower than the growth rate of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has continuously risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', with an abnormal signal of 'high attention' for file submission. Candidates reported poor communication in admissions, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission line that year. This negative public opinion may have a lagging effect on subsequent years' application psychology. However, Douyin popularity ranks 13th (high heat), with a large number of positive exposures on living conditions such as the cafeteria. In the 2025–2026 reputation documents, no new major negative incidents were found for China Agricultural University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above, mainly in agriculture and forestry. Although the liberal arts majors (Law, Communication, Sociology, Business Administration, English, etc.) are not the university's core advantageous disciplines, they remain competitive relying on the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular and recommended; Communication belongs to the journalism and communication category (clearly discouraged); Business Administration belongs to the business category (clearly discouraged); English belongs to the foreign language category (generally wait-and-see). The popularity of liberal arts majors is clearly differentiated. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, the number of history category examinees is about 42,000, an increase of about 29% compared to 2025. The significant expansion of the examinee scale intensifies competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Inner Mongolian examinees. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Inner Mongolia has increased significantly in recent years (5→5→6→10→21→22), with a notable increase in enrollment proportion, but the growth rate of examinees still far exceeds the growth rate of the plan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan expansion (+4.8%) but far less than the examinee growth rate (+29%), the continuous rise in school rankings enhancing attractiveness, the possible lagging effect of the 2024 negative public opinion, and the differentiation of liberal arts major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1140, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1188, with a range of 1010–1366.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Economics
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Marketing (Yantai Research Institute)
- Public Administration (Yantai Research Institute)
- E-commerce (Yantai Research Institute).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1010–1366, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for appropriate risk-taking, and Tier 3 as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1010), you can focus on impacting relatively popular majors such as Law and Economics. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>1366), you should mainly choose majors from the Yantai Research Institute to ensure admission.
